title: Grofers is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Grofers is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grofers invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!
